filesModified.purpose: Replace broad getBlocks() subscription with narrow direct-children key selector to prevent race condition on deeply-nested block insertion

testPage.note: TSX-only change; no PHP or test page update needed

fixesApplied.issue: console error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'meta')
fixesApplied.description: Replaced `const innerBlocks = useSelect((select) => select(blockEditorStore).getBlocks(clientId), [clientId])` with a selector that returns both `directChildren` (the blocks array) and `directChildrenKey` (a serialized string of `name:clientId` pairs). Changed useEffect dependency from `[innerBlocks, clientId, replaceInnerBlocks]` to `[directChildrenKey, clientId, replaceInnerBlocks]`. The effect body now references `directChildren` for its logic. Added eslint-disable-next-line comment for react-hooks/exhaustive-deps since `directChildren` is intentionally omitted from deps (it is always in sync with `directChildrenKey` from the same selector call). Effect no longer fires on deeply-nested block changes (text edits, attribute changes, adding FooterInfoSocialItem), only on direct child add/remove/reorder. Also ran bun run format to fix prettier indentation on comment lines.
